transcript: Speaker A: आप कौन? [Who are you?] Speaker B: वो आपने 1 रुपये में english learning app का ट्रायल आर्डर किया था। [You had ordered the English learning app trial for 1 rupee.] Speaker A: बस 1 ही रुपये में? बट मैंने तो नहीं किया था। [Just for 1 rupee? But I didn't do it.] Speaker B: आपके हस्बैंड ने किया होगा, उनसे पूछो। [Your husband must have done it, ask him.] Speaker A: आपने कोई 1 रुपये वाला english learning app आर्डर किया है क्या? [Did you order some 1 rupee English learning app?] Speaker C: अरे हाँ हाँ, वो MySivi app मैंने ही आर्डर किया है। [Oh yes yes, I ordered that MySivi app.] Speaker A: पर इस app में ऐसा क्या है? आपने तो english books भी आर्डर की थी, पर अभी तक english नहीं बोल पाते हैं। [But what is in this app? You also ordered English books, but still can't speak English.] Speaker C: अरे इस app में एक AI teacher है जिसके साथ बिना जजमेंट के english प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हैं। [Oh, this app has an AI teacher with whom we can practice English without judgment.] Speaker B: बिलकुल सही। मेरे साथ बस डेली 15 min english प्रैक्टिस करो एंड कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी english फर्राटेदार हो जाएगी। [Exactly. Just practice English with me for 15 minutes daily and in a few days your English will become fluent.] Speaker A: फिर कैसे शुरू करूँ? [Then how do I start?] Speaker B: बस इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi app इंस्टॉल करो, एंड अपनी 15 days english learning चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start your 15 days English learning challenge.] Speaker D: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi English speaking app डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi English speaking app.]
on_screen_text: Wo aapne 1 rupye me english learning app ka trail order kiya tha [You had ordered the English learning app trial for 1 rupee], 1 Rupee, Aapke husband [Your husband], koi 1 rupye wala english learning app order kiya hai [ordered some 1 rupee english learning app], MySivi, iss app me aisa kya hai [what is in this app], iss app me ek AI [an AI in this app], mere sath bas daily 15 min english and kuch hi dino me [just daily 15 min english with me and in a few days], farattedaar [fluent], Bas install button [Just install button], and apni 15 days english learning challenge [and your 15 days english learning challenge], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A humanoid robot arrives at a couple's door to deliver a 1-rupee trial of the MySivi English learning app. The husband explains that the app's AI teacher allows for judgment-free practice, and the robot invites them to start a 15-day fluency challenge. The ad concludes with a call to install the app.
